specific_question: How many vehicles with solid-state batteries are projected to be produced in 2025 at Elexion Automotive?
answer: Several prototypes with solid-state batteries are expected to reach production volumes of up to 10,000 units at Elexion Automotive in 2025.
justification: Details on battery technology production are provided and are unrelated to specific industry testing procedures.
dr_question: Given that one in seven new vehicles sold in Canada in 2024 were zero-emission, how can Elexion Automotive’s QA team enhance cold-weather testing protocols by Q4 2026 to improve EV battery endurance and reliability in the country’s key ZEV markets?
